security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: https://api.qrserver.com; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* http://192.168.*.*:* https://*.local:*; img-src 'self' data: https://api.qrserver.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://rsms.me; font-src 'self' https://rsms.me data:

bundle.longDescription: Open-Jarvis is your personal, self-hosted AI infrastructure. The desktop client connects to your Open-Jarvis server and gives you a native window for chat, memory and device management.
